title: Turmeric Nourishing Rice
ingredients_html:
• 12 oz edamame
  • 1 can great northern beans
  • 1/4 to 1/2 head of red cabbage
  • 1 red bell pepper
  • 1/2 avocado
  • 3-4 scallions
  • 1/2 bunch cilantro
  • chili flakes, to taste
  • sesame seed, to taste
  • 1/4 cup soy sauce
  • 2 tsp chinkiag vinegar
  • 2-8 TBSP Chili Oil/Crisp
  • 1 tsp Sichuan Peppercorn Oil
  • 1/2 cup Tahini
  • 1-2 garlic cloves, minced
steps_html:
1. Add edamame, beans, red cabbage, bell pepper, avocado, scallions, cilantro, chili flakes, and sesame seeds to a bowl.
  2. In a seperate bowl, whisk together soy sauce, vinegar, chili crisp, sichuan peppercorn oil, tahini, and garlic.
  3. Combine salad and dressing.
